spec_match.rationale: The page names and exercises NavigatorDeviceMemory, navigator.deviceMemory, WorkerNavigator exposure, and Sec-CH-Device-Memory.

interactive.rationale: Controls run live API probes, fetch the client-hint echo endpoint, and simulate bucket changes across platforms.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes the same API, client-hint, and platform-specific bucket coverage as the concept.

edge_cases.rationale: The page surfaces unsupported API, missing client hint, legacy fixed-list maps, changed low-memory gates, and clamped upper bounds.

design_system.rationale: The updated CSS uses shared design tokens and pairs all local button background overrides with explicit color.

summary: The compatibility lab now covers the named API and client-hint surfaces, exposes platform-specific Chrome 147 buckets accurately, and includes interactive failure-mode checks.
